speakers.name: Rohit Jawa
direct_answers: Arnab Mitra's question on outlook change
speakers.summary: Rohit Jawa opened the call with a confident tone, providing a comprehensive overview of the operating context and commodity pricing. He highlighted the slowdown in FMCG volume growth and the resilience of premiumization trends. Rohit emphasized the company's strategic focus on maintaining price agility and addressing consumer needs through calibrated pricing actions. He directly addressed questions about the outlook, indicating a proactive approach to market challenges. His statements reflected a strong commitment to leveraging market opportunities and sustaining competitive performance.

speakers.name: Ritesh Tiwari
direct_answers: Arnab Mitra's question on demand trends
speakers.summary: Ritesh Tiwari provided a detailed analysis of the financial results, maintaining a neutral tone throughout his presentation. He discussed the company's strategic management of commodity costs and the focus on savings across the P&L. Ritesh highlighted the execution plans for the Ice Cream demerger and recent acquisition, projecting a cautious outlook on price growth. He directly addressed questions about demand trends, emphasizing the company's dynamic approach to managing business challenges and maintaining profitability.

speakers.name: Shilpa Kedia
speakers.role: Group Financial Controller and Head Investor Relations
speakers.summary: Shilpa Kedia managed the logistics of the conference call, maintaining a neutral tone. She introduced the speakers and outlined the agenda for the call, ensuring a smooth transition into the prepared remarks. Shilpa also facilitated the Q&A session, providing clear instructions to participants and ensuring the call adhered to the scheduled timeline. Her role was crucial in maintaining the structure and flow of the conference.
